info.english_meaning: to abandonto leaveto desertto omitto neglect
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' gatO tyAge yaTAsaNKyaM jihIte ca jahAti ca ' (Slo. 11) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SrutaM me mA prahAsIH' (E॰u॰) antarRItaRyarTo'tra jahAtiH mA sma hAPya ityarTaH
'nIqaM SakuntA iva jAtapakzASCandAMsyenaM prajahatyantakAle' (BA0 u0 435) prajahati vijahati praSabdaH prakarze
'AyurmA prahAsIt' (tE0 brA0 12127) mA prahAsIt mA tyAkzIt
'yAvadgrAsaM sannayannaskandayannApajihItA'pajihIta vA' (Apa॰Da॰2.19.5) nApajihIta savyena pARinA na muYced ityujjvalA CAndasamAtmanepadam neha ohANaH prayogaH arTAsaNgateH
'sa vilalApa sagadgadaM sahajAmapyapahAya DIratAm' (raGu॰8.43) atrApaSabdo viSezakfnna
'saM sahase purumAyo jihIte' (f0 3514) saMjihIte=gamanodyamaM karoti
'yadA vE tAntaH prARaM laBate'Ta saMjihIte' (kO0 u0) saMjihIte=uttizWati
'sEtena prARena samajihIta' (Sa0 brA0 42211) samajihIta=udasTAt=samajIvIt
'tata: punarnasahAsyante' (Sa0 brA0 12411) notTAsyanti na Sira unnamayizyantItyAha
'yaTA jale saYjihate jalOkasaH' (BA0 pu0 104015) saMjihate pracarantIti SrIDaraH yaTAnyatra taTehApi kave rUQiM pratyanAdaraH
'sa ha prAtaH saMjihAna uvAca' (CAM0 u0 5115) saMjihAnaH SayyAM parityajan

sampUrvo jahAtiH SayyAparityAge vartate taTA ca brAhmaRe prayogaH - 'kaliH SayAno Bavati saMjihAnastu dvAparaH' (E0 brA0 715) iti sAyaRaH atra sAyaRIye vacane jahAtirityanena ohANo grahaRaM veditavyaM na tvohAkaH
'sa visrastEH parvaBiH na SaSAka saMhAtum' (Sa0 brA0 1336) saMhAtum=utTAtum
'utsaMhAyAsTAt' (f0 2384) sarvo lokaH SayyAM vihAya udasTAd avaSizwaM karma kartuM punaruttizWatIti sAyaRaH
'saMhAya ato devA avantu naH' (f0 2216) iti triretam ASva0 gf0 229) sahAya=SayitvotTAya
'asminnAkASe Syeno vA suparRo vA viparipatya SrAntaH saMhAya pakzO saMlayAyEva Driyate' (bf0 u0 4319) saMhAya saSlezya saMkocya
'vidyuto jyotiH parisaMjihAnaM mitrAvaruRA yadapaSyatAM tvA' (f0 73310) saYjihAnamutTitam

'saMhAya sOryARi svastyayanAni ca japitvA' (ASva0 gf0 2312) saMhAya saMSasyeti nArAyaRo vfttikAraH sampUrva ohAN SayyAta utTAne rUQa iti prasmaraRapratyayametat pUrvasUtre saMhAya ato devA bruvantu na ityatra saMhAyetyutTAyetyevaM svenEvArTABiDAnAt
'parAyadByo'vahIye saKiByaH' (f0 10345) avahIye=pfzWatastyajye
'asmAsvavahInezu' (SA0) uktorTaH
'avahInAH kaTAH' (daSaku0) avahInAH=avasitAH=viratAH
'vikriyAyASca sadBAve nityatvamavahIyate' (tattvasaM0 295) avahIyate hIyate nArTo'vena asTAne cAyam
'mA vayametamavahAya parA gAma' (kAWaka saM0 712) avahAya pfzWato vihAya
'tugro ha BujyumaSvinodameGe rayiM na kaScinmamfvA~ avAhAH' (f0 11163) avAhAH=avastAdahAsIt
'vihAya lakzmIpatilakzma kArmukaM jawADaraH saYjuhuDIha pAvakam' (ki0 144) vihAya saMnyasya parityajya
'jYAtAsvAdo vivftajaGanAM ko vihAtuM samarTaH' (meGa0 43) vihAtumutsrazwum ujJitum
'ni za hIyatAM tanvA tanA ca' (f0 710410 aTarva0 8410) nihIyatAM niyataM hIyatAm
'ni hIyatAmatiyAjasya yazwA' (f0 6521) ukto'rTaH
'nihIyate yena yaSo'rTasidDyA' (avadA0 jA0 2130) nihIyate kzIyate
'muKyAnamAtyAnyo hitvA nihInAnkurute priyAn' (BA0 SAM0 9332) nihIno'pasadaH
'nyasmE devI svaDiti rjihIte' (f0 53210) devI dyotamAnA dyOH asmA indrAya nijihIte nIcErgacCati nihIno'pasado jAlmaH (ityamaraH)
'ni vo vanA jihate yAmano BiyA' (f0 5573) nijihate'vanamanti nyaYcanti kampante
'atihAya pUrvAmAhutiM tUzRImuttarAM samiDi juhoti' (BA0 SrO0 61210) atihAya atikramya pUrvasyA AhuteH pareRa
'mA'smAnatihAya dAH' (ni0 137) atihAya=atikramya parihftya
'asya lokasyodDAnAya' (paYca0 brA0 181110) udDAnamatyantAya hAnaM parityAgaH
'vayamevAtraM kAlajYA na kAlaH parihAsyate' (BA0 SAM 13894) vilambo na BavizyatItyarTaH
'parihIyate gamanavelA' (SA0 4) atikrAmatItyarTaH
'Aryasya suvihitaprayogatayA na kimapi parihAsyate' (SA0 1) na kimapi parihIRaM nyUnaM vikalaM BavizyatItyarTaH
'ojasvitayA na parihIyate SacyAH' (vikrama0 3) na parihIyate nApakfzyate
'na praticCandAtparihIyate maDuratA' (mAla0 2) ukto'rTaH
'anudivasaM parihIyate'NgEH' (SA0 3) parihIyate kzIyate
'laGuSarIrAH prAk kAzWAmApnuvan paryahIyanta medurAH' (iti vayam) paryahIyanta avahInA aBUvan pfzWaBAge'DAvannityarTaH**
